title: Add Ask PollinationsAI for an image to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: PowerShell Pixels
gist.blurb: A new community integration lets you generate images straight from PowerShell, .NET, and Azure. Time to make those terminal scripts a lot more colorful!
gist.summary: Added a new community integration for generating Pollinations images directly from PowerShell, .NET, and Azure environments.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily integrate AI image generation into their Windows and enterprise scripting workflows.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about PowerShell, .NET, and Azure integration. Visual symbols: a retro terminal/command prompt, blue/white colors (PowerShell), maybe a glowing script. Characters: Polly the bee wearing a tiny IT admin tie or glasses, typing on a retro terminal that is sprouting colorful pixel flowers (images).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny IT admin glasses, typing on a retro computer terminal with a blue screen. Colorful pixel flowers and glowing images are popping out of the monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny IT admin glasses, typing on a retro computer terminal with a blue screen. Colorful pixel flowers and glowing images are popping out of the monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
